entries.text: Hotkey Management window: assign global keyboard shortcuts from a dedicated panel in Settings
Toggle Petals hotkey: press a key combo to open or close your petals from anywhere
Toggle Bloom hotkey: show or hide the entire Bloom window with a single shortcut
Per-item hotkeys: assign a key combo to any item to launch it directly, or to any group to open its bloom
Show Bloom at Cursor: enable this option to have Bloom appear at your mouse position when triggered by hotkey
Working directory: optionally set a startup folder for each Software or Command item (defaults to Documents)
Hotkey conflict detection warns you when a key combo is already assigned to another action
Clear buttons next to every hotkey field let you unset shortcuts with a single click
Item hotkey tree view displays groups as parents with their children indented underneath
Launched applications now run as independent processes instead of child processes of Bloom
Hotkeys no longer fire multiple times when held down or pressed rapidly
Auto-unbloom now works correctly when the bloom is opened via a hotkey
Groups: organize your items into folders that open as nested blooms
Navigate into groups with a click and use the back button to return
Dedicated 'Add Group' petal in the settings bloom for quick group creation
Edit groups by right-clicking their petal — change name, icon, color, and members
Cycle detection prevents circular group nesting
Exit icon updated to a log-out arrow for better clarity
Click-through: clicks pass through empty space to apps behind the bloom
Canvas size is now computed once from the largest group, improving performance
Icon and color changes now save correctly when editing items and groups
Bloom no longer hides instantly on focus loss — smooth close animation plays
Focus loss respects the 'auto unbloom' setting — bloom stays open when disabled
Auto unbloom now works reliably on repeated open/close cycles
Clicking a group petal no longer closes the bloom — it navigates into the group
Opening dialogs (settings, add item, etc.) no longer races with the focus-loss close
Always on Top setting: choose whether Bloom stays above all windows or behaves like a normal window
Bloom button always renders on top of petals for reliable click access
Dragging Bloom while petals are animating now snaps them to their final position instantly
Petals no longer lose their topmost status when focusing another window (with auto-unbloom off)
Petal canvas now stays centered on the Bloom button after dragging or on fresh app start
Drag & drop files, folders, shortcuts and executables directly onto Bloom to add them
Smart file-type icons: video, image, audio, code, archive, spreadsheet and more get their own icon
Toast notification confirms when items are added via drag & drop
Changelog window shows what's new after each update
Bloom button lights up with color when dragging files over it
Drag & drop now works even while the bloom menu is open
Exit icon changed from X to a dedicated icon for better clarity
Settings file no longer gets deleted during updates
Folder labels no longer appear empty when added via drag & drop
Petal window no longer clips on first launch
